title: Emergency Hammer Window Punch and Seat Belt Cutter
description:
The Emergency Hammer is a tool every driver should have! It is designed to help prevent being trapped in a wrecked or submerged vehicle. Should the doors become jammed shut or a seat belt locked after an accident, the double-sided steel hammer points allow the driver to easily shatter side and rear windows, while a safeguarded razor blade cuts easily through safety belts for a quick escape. This emergency hammer includes a black mounting bracket for quick access installation to a roof, dash, or console. The bright orange plastic body make the hammer easy to find and a glow-in-the-dark pin helps spotting in the dark or murky water easier.

Emergency Hammer Window Punch and Seat Belt Cutter

The Emergency Hammer is a tool every driver should have! It is designed to help prevent being trapped in a wrecked or submerged vehicle.

  • Safeguarded Razor Blade Cuts Trough Seat Belts to Help Free You and Your Passengers
  • Black Mounting Bracket to Keep Hammer In Reach & Glow-in-the-Dark Button For Easy Spotting in the Dark
  • Strong Bright Orange Plastic Body
  • Light and Compact

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CC4074-433
  • UPC: 752416095636
  • Color: Orange
